zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Woodhouse於1477年出生在英國諾福爾可吉波利時，他的父親Edward Woodhouse33歲，母親Jane Swaithing33歲。他於1488年9月12日與Thomasine Townsend在英國諾福爾可吉波利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1521年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Woodhouse于1477年出生在英国諾福爾可吉波利时，他的父亲Edward Woodhouse33岁，母亲Jane Swaithing33岁。他于1488年9月12日与Thomasine Townsend在英国諾福爾可吉波利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1521年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodhouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places (in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Yorkshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, and elsewhere) called Woodhouse, or a topographic name for someone who lived at a ‘house in the wood’ (Middle English wode, hous, Old English wudu, hūs).

variant of Woodiwiss , from Middle English wodewose, which by the 16th century was sometimes written as wodowes, woodose, and wodehouse. The confusion with woodhouse probably arose because both words (and both names) were pronounced /wudus/ or /wudǝs/ in local dialect.

variants.name: Woodis
meanings: perhaps a nickname from Old English wuduwāsa‘faun, satyr’.
alternatively, a shortened form of   Woodhouse  .

variants.name: Woodiwiss
meanings: English (mainly Derbyshire and Yorkshire): nickname from Middle English wodewose, wodewese (Old English wudewāse) ‘wild man of the woods’. This word was also used to denote a person dressed to represent such a being in a play or pageant. Wodewoses (male and female) were mythical creatures of English and ancient Germanic folklore, akin to the fauns and satyrs of Classical mythology. The surname may also have been acquired by someone who lived and worked in the woods or perhaps by an unusually hairy man.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Woodhouse was born in 1477, in Kimberley, Norfolk, England, his father, Edward Woodhouse, was 33 and his mother, Jane Swaithing, was 33. He married Thomasine Townsend on 12 September 1488, in Kimberley, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1521, in Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Woodhouse est né en 1477, à Kimberley, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Edward Woodhouse, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Jane Swaithing, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Thomasine Townsend le 12 septembre 1488, à Kimberley, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1521, à Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Woodhouse 1477 in Kimberley, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Woodhouse 33 und seine Mutter Jane Swaithing 33. Er hat am 12. September 1488 in Kimberley, Norfolk, England Thomasine Townsend geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1521 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Woodhouse è nato il nel 1477 nel Kimberley, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Edward Woodhouse, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Jane Swaithing, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Thomasine Townsend il 12 settembre 1488, nel Kimberley, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1521, nel Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Woodhouseが1477年にイギリスノーフォルクキンバーリーで生まれた時，父Edward Woodhouseは33歳，母Jane Swaithingは33歳であった。1488年9月12日にイギリスノーフォルクキンバーリーでThomasine Townsendと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1521年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスラプストンで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Woodhouse(이)가 1477년 영국 노르폴크 킴벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Woodhouse(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Swaithing(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1488년 9월 12일 영국 노르폴크 킴벌리에서 Thomasine Townsend(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스라프스턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Woodhouse nasceu em 1477, em Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Woodhouse, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Jane Swaithing, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Thomasine Townsend em 12 de setembro de 1488, em Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1521, em Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Woodhouse родился в 1477 г. в местности кимбирли, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward Woodhouse было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Swaithing, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasine Townsend 12 сентября 1488 г. в местности кимбирли, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1521 г. в местности трапстон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Woodhouse nació en 1477, en Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Woodhouse, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Jane Swaithing, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Thomasine Townsend el 12 de septiembre de 1488, en Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1521, en Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años.
